title: trichocentrum funale
intro: Trichocentrum funale, also known as the Funnel Orchid or Yellow Funnel, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties, which help to loosen and clear mucus from the lungs. The medicinal properties of Trichocentrum funale include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial activities. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for oral consumption, or as a topical application to take advantage of its health benefits.
